name: Community Short-Term Loans
description_short: Community Short-Term Loans is a Detroit-based payday lender offering quick cash advances of $100–$2,500 with flexible repayment options and 24/7 availability.
description_long:
Community Short-Term Loans operates as a payday loan provider headquartered in Detroit, Michigan at 18570 Grand River Ave, Ste 100. The company is accessible around the clock, seven days a week, positioning itself as an immediate cash solution for consumers facing emergency financial needs.

The company offers payday loans ranging from $100 to $2,500, marketed as a simple online application process with fast funding. According to customer testimonials on their profile, the loan application can be completed in approximately one hour. They provide borrowers with two repayment options: repayment on the next payday or deferral to the following payday with an additional fee, giving some flexibility in repayment timing.

Community Short-Term Loans differentiates itself through round-the-clock accessibility and a streamlined online application process. The company emphasizes data security in their marketing materials and provides multiple contact channels including phone (+1 313-334-3372), email (support@mbvt.com), and their website. Their alternative domain (communitybcinc.com) suggests corporate backing or multiple operating entities.

As a traditional payday lender, this company operates in a high-cost lending segment. While testimonials indicate fast processing, payday loans typically carry significant fees and interest rates that can exceed 400% APR on an annualized basis. Borrowers should carefully consider whether the speed and convenience justify the substantial cost of short-term debt, and explore lower-cost alternatives like credit union PALs (36% APR cap) or employer advances before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 24/7 accessibility across all days of the week for loan applications and customer service
Quick processing — customer testimonial reports one-hour completion from application to approval
Flexible repayment options allowing deferral to a second payday with additional fee
Simple online application form marketed for fast access to funds
Wide loan amount range from $100 to $2,500 to meet varying emergency needs
Multiple contact channels available (phone, email, website support)
Data security assurance provided to borrowers during application process
cons: Typical payday loan structure with substantial fees and interest rates (rates not disclosed on website but industry standard is 400%+ APR)
Deferral to second payday adds additional fees, increasing total cost of borrowing
Only 2 customer reviews available on their profile, limiting transparency about actual borrower experiences
No alternative products or lower-cost options mentioned — exclusively focused on high-cost payday lending
Limited information about terms, APR, fees, or repayment penalties on the provided website content
best_for: Consumers facing genuine emergencies who need cash within hours and have reliable income for repayment on next payday
Borrowers who have exhausted other options and explicitly understand and accept payday loan costs
Workers with stable employment who can guarantee repayment without rolling the loan into subsequent pay periods
diagnosis: Community Short-Term Loans is best for workers facing urgent cash shortfalls who can repay within one pay cycle and understand payday loan costs. The critical caveat: payday loans are extremely expensive, often exceeding 400% APR. Before applying, explore credit union PALs (capped at 36% APR), employer advances, or borrowing from family — substantially cheaper alternatives exist.
services: Two repayment options (next payday or payday thereafter)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 18570 Grand River Ave Ste 100, Detroit, MI 48223
